items.raw_desc: Autóemelő SIXTOL pótkocsis, SX TRAILER JACK 900 kg, hegesztett, lapos:The SIXTOL SX TRAILER JACK 900KG trailer jack is designed for fixed installation on the frame of a trailer, trolley or caravan using a flat flange that is directly welded to the structure. The flat design is ideal for users who require maximum mounting strength and stability without the need for pipe or sleeve attachment. All-metal welded construction ensures long life and reliability in everyday use. The jack allows convenient extension and retraction with an integrated swivel mechanism and is suitable for stabilising and lifting when parking or changing a wheel. Its sturdy flat base guarantees safety even on softer ground. With a load capacity of up to 900 kg, it is ideal for most commonly used trailers. Perfect for garages, truck rental companies, caravanners and craftsmen.
